style_guide: Painted kid-friendly spy adventure, outdoor Earth helper station, readable objects, no text inside generated images.

assets.prompt: A bright children's spy-adventure park cleanup station with a wooden Earth helper board, normal-scale recycling bins, reuse craft table with box, small seed packet by the seed bed, cleanup sign, Earth gate path, and clear open foreground. No readable text or oversized clue props.
Transparent-background prop sheet for an Earth helper level: Earth helper board, recycling bin, reuse box with bottle and paper, seed packet, cleanup sign, Earth gate marker. No letters or numbers.

assets.decision: Reuse the polished existing guide spritesheet until a dedicated Ranger Nia sheet can match the same quality and walk-cycle constraints.
Reuse Agent Alex's existing natural walk-cycle spritesheet so Level 10 keeps the same playable hero identity and animation constraints.
Reuse the existing Agent Alex portrait sheet for dialogue expressions until a level-specific portrait pass is needed.

future_generation_brief.background: A bright children's spy-adventure park cleanup station with a recycling corner, reusable craft table, small seed bed, Earth gate path, and clear open foreground. No readable text.
future_generation_brief.interactive_props: Transparent-background prop sheet for an Earth helper level: recycling bin, reuse box with bottle and paper, seed packet, helper board, Earth gate marker. No letters or numbers.
future_generation_brief.guide: Ranger Nia guide spritesheet matching existing character proportions, kid-friendly outdoor helper outfit, clean walk-cycle layout.

integration_note: Level 10 now uses an embedded-prop Earth Helper background for all world objects. The transparent prop atlas remains referenced only for inventory reward icons; scene hotspots and the Earth gate are represented by painted background art.
